characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair tied back. She has distinct winged eyeliner.
characters.wardrobe: Pink zip-up hoodie over a dark t-shirt.
characters.demeanor: Casual, focused on makeup, slightly hesitant when speaking Korean.

characters.appearance: Animated female character with red hair and green eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Not fully visible, appears to be wearing a light-colored top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलना बहुत मुश्किल है। [Speaking English is very hard.]
Character B says: What's your name? [What's your name?]
Character A says: My name is Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: How are you? [How are you?]
Character A says: How are you? [How are you?]
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I... [Yes, I...]
Character B says: Yes, I speak it. [Yes, I speak it.]
Character A says: Yes, I speak it. [Yes, I speak it.]
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: I... twenty-four...? [I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: I am 24. [I am 24.]
Character A says: I am 24. [I am 24.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: learner finds English hard but is practicing while doing everyday tasks.
- Shows the AI tutor correcting pronunciation and grammar in real-time.
- Builds empathy and shows the practical, low-pressure learning environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलना बहुत मुश्किल है।
English bolna bahut mushkil hai.
Speaking English is very hard.
What's your name?
My name is Nesly.
How are you?
Do you speak English?
Yes, I...
Yes, I speak it.
How old are you?
I... twenty-four...?
I am 24.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं रोज़ English practice कैसे कर सकती हूँ? [How can I practice my English every day?]
Character B says: Just download Supernova. [Just download Supernova.]
Character A says: I'll download Supernova right now. [I'll download Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Direct address to camera asking for a solution.
- AI tutor provides the brand name as the answer.
- Learner commits to downloading the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैं रोज़ English practice कैसे कर सकती हूँ?
Just download Supernova.
I'll download Supernova right now.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Final call to action.
- Displays app store badges for credibility.

Supernova
GET IT ON Google Play
